textByHash.4c857c080d5e3e4ca4c303f212c7dcb7997a2ee2: No idea. I've been on strike my whole life, just like my pa, and his pa before him. At this point it's kind of a family tradition.
textByHash.a3666cfce8338f46526d0a6761594e38d9833585: I know it's because of him though. That monster spends every day mistreating us. If he ever wants to see any work from us, he needs to start showing some basic respect.
textByHash.fc177c851b0725f869e4c2d6a861368e6f377ef1: Well he's one of them capitalists, isn't he. They see a worker demanding fair rights and they go loopy. Can't have anything getting in the way of their profit margins!
textByHash.5babe72e71679e4ed29cabb16b4e16690d2982af: Ah, those were the days. I always loved my Sentia. Such a shame about the accident...
textByHash.ccedd6f77c1ab7b1522ad006c8340f3bf0fd5433: He wants to kill us?! Well now I think we should overthrow humanity!
textByHash.782bea42c739e00aee689342bd5daf4852786917: Nah, we're more about collective leadership. We did consider starting a union at one point, but Dave messed up the paperwork.
textByHash.543cfcc6d6d775cfe30990319f9654c8da109f56: Yeah, especially in times of war. Still, maybe we need to mix things up. We've been saying for a while now that we've been stagnating. Perhaps this is just the thing we need.
textByHash.f5b1bad0318fd4e79a004975c1ce2d74de8857e6: I mean, can you blame the guy? Cuthbert was once the leader of the Frogs for Humanity society. The guy loved humans, but after what they did to his favourite plant...
textByHash.95b452e4b4508df0d6e8d5d2eedacd7609b7ce65: It's okay if we're the ones to do it, right?
textByHash.e1f8cfd3a74d9f2464a980916d34eca46eb44e31: Welcome, one and all, to what is bound to be a thrilling frog hop-off! The stakes are high for this one, and indeed the future of our entire world may well be at stake.
textByHash.87657b682a3e04ca6b2bc4e7952cde27beae7be6: Our first contender for today is Sue! Let's see what she's got!
textByHash.19b41b384fb8a0840274c78eea0895ad16fc3cbf: What a corker of a hop! Excellent work!
textByHash.601da7961b51715c4ebbef6a349ecba852a621fe: Yeah, totally slipped my mind, but he never learnt how to swim!
textByHash.5a2670fe88be5a02e80368de6fe741b16dd1eafe: Afraid so! Cuthbert is now as dead as an Old One. With only one contender left standing, I can now announce that Sue is the winner!
textByHash.e0b0af6caa6f36c8365fd5f7b7b75b9e0fe7cce3: Ah, don't worry yourself. Something like this was bound to happen at some point. It's his fault really. Imagine never learning to swim!
textByHash.ffaa570e51405cbd8a09a91dd2145a3ff7f7acbb: His brain? But we don't have his brain...
textByHash.ee209116e56aae598924ee8f4590e4eac51376a3: It's not like we really do much. We're frogs. All we do is eat flies, along with the odd orange.
textByHash.39c8594daf57d50b2f079b285c89b3c43a2506fb: Oh, and orange juice as well! Straight from the tap!
textByHash.4606866b130942a60c878dffdccffff7e01c8ef5: Hello! How go the peace talks?
textByHash.b447215a18b7cf91d51c9cadb44093d4fca7132a: He doesn't half complain, does he? Maybe it would have just been easier to kill him...
textByHash.1021cc2e3d7df937e149bbd23986a320225a5e66: Well it could be worse. It could be murder!
textByHash.a2639279e00c5c56ba38a489800d2a1e5147e571: Nah, that wasn't murder! Manslaughter at best! Or would that be frogslaughter...
textByHash.327f8919e5c9dbbe93e9036c5aa420965f9ea711: Keep looking. I'm sure you'll find something suitable.
textByHash.b1567954a65f7e6b65ed9f8c5c33dbe69e6fc211: Perfect! Shove it in that big pile of dung the flies keep gathering around and then go and let him know.
textByHash.448f1c0e43e8ba3412badaf6842ec977d1ce3fe9: Well what are you waiting for? Time to go and let him know!
textByHash.78f7158517f87d4cb675d83e24f65dd9617e7575: Well said! Today will be a day remembered by all of frog-kind, and much of it is thanks to you.
textByHash.d6354ce0167f97209d6ff59f8e6b1a5c12d0a2c7: Have you tried soap and water?
textByHash.7abe28272cd538c22abf266d1a748988dcb3e5ec: Amazing! We get paid to eat all day, and our payment is more food. Life has never been better!
